payload.prompt:
Task: Run flow-2 verification checks and produce docs/verification.md. Follow steps exactly.
Emit exactly one directive per turn.
1) ACT:tool:read_file:{"path":"README.md"}
2) ACT:tool:write_file:{"path":"docs/verification.md","content":"# Verification Notes\n\n- Runtime adapter: native (OpenRouter provider)\n- Flow execution: two flows with inter-flow dependency\n- Tool coverage: read_file, list_files, write_file, run_command, git_status, git_diff, graph_query\n- Host validation command: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`\n- Runtime hardening evidence: runtime state bootstrap + component readiness events","append":false}
3) ACT:tool:run_command:{"command":"python3","args":["-m","unittest","discover","-s","tests","-v"]}
4) ACT:tool:git_status:{}
5) ACT:tool:git_diff:{"staged":false}
6) DONE:verification artifact and final checks completed

Success Criteria: Done
